Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection out of all activities in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is followed by SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that occurs before any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that are part of variants ending with a final editorial decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Minor Revision, SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection events that are not followed by any SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not occur

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection appears more than once
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to other initial-phase activities such as SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that directly precedes a reviewer deadline notification (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Number of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection activities occurring after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' occurs

Name: Ratio of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to total reviewer-invitation-related activities (including SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in high-duration variants (performance > 1,000,000 seconds) versus low-duration variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases
